def solution():

"""
[Jason] always had some great adventure planned for his granddaughter [Guillermina] when she came to visit. So, naturally, when [Myrna] told her daughter [Guillermina] that they would be going to visit [Jason] she could hardly contain herself.
Question: How is [Jason] related to [Myrna]?
"""
# solution in Python:
def solution():
    # [Jason] always had some great adventure planned for his granddaughter [Guillermina] when she came to visit.
    relation(Jason, Guillermina) = (grandfather, granddaughter)
    # So, naturally, when [Myrna] told her daughter [Guillermina] that they would be going to visit [Jason] she could hardly contain herself.
    relation(Myrna, Guillermina) = (mother, daughter)
    # How is [Jason] related to [Myrna]?
    return relation(Jason, Myrna)




"""
[Gabrielle] drove her daughter [Dorothy] to the hospital. [Dorothy]'s son [Vincent] showed up shortly after.
Question: How is [Vincent] related to [Gabrielle]?
"""
# solution in Python:
def solution():
    # [Gabrielle] drove her daughter [Dorothy] to the hospital.
    relation(Gabrielle, Dorothy) = (mother, daughter)
    # [Dorothy]'s son [Vincent] showed up shortly after.
    relation(Dorothy, Vincent) = (mother, son)
    # How is [Vincent] related to [Gabrielle]?
    return relation(Vincent, Gabrielle)




"""
[Dorothy] took her daughter [Michelle] and her mother [Gabrielle] car shopping.
Question: How is [Michelle] related to [Gabrielle]?
"""
# solution in Python:
def solution():
    # [Dorothy] took her daughter [Michelle] and her mother [Gabrielle] car shopping.
    relation(Dorothy, Michelle) = (mother, daughter)
    relation(Dorothy, Gabrielle) = (daughter, mother)
    # How is [Michelle] related to [Gabrielle]?
    return relation(Michelle, Gabrielle)




"""
[Teresa] and her brother [Ellis] were having a wonderful time at Disneyland. [Ellis] asked his grandmother, [Molly], to read him a bedtime story. [Molly] read him Hansel & Gretel, which the boy always loved. [Sandra] is married to Thomas and when she was 24, the couple welcomed [Teresa] into the world.
Question: How is [Molly] related to [Sandra]?
"""
# solution in Python:
def solution():
    # [Teresa] and her brother [Ellis] were having a wonderful time at Disneyland.
    relation(Teresa, Ellis) = (sister, brother)
    # [Ellis] asked his grandmother, [Molly], to read him a bedtime story.
    relation(Ellis, Molly) = (grandson, grandmother)
    # [Sandra] is married to Thomas and when she was 24, the couple welcomed [Teresa] into the world.
    relation(Sandra, Teresa) = (mother, daughter)
    # How is [Molly] related to [Sandra]?
    return relation(Molly, Sandra)




"""
[Carlos] and his sister, [Annie], went shopping. [Annie] asked her mom [Valerie] if she wanted anything, but [Valerie] said no. [Carlos] is [Clarence]'s Brother.
Question: How is [Valerie] related to [Clarence]?
"""
# solution in Python:
def solution():
    # [Carlos] and his sister, [Annie], went shopping.
    relation(Carlos, Annie) = (brother, sister)
    # [Annie] asked her mom [Valerie] if she wanted anything, but [Valerie] said no.
    relation(Annie, Valerie) = (daughter, mother)
    # [Carlos] is [Clarence]'s Brother.
    relation(Clarence, Carlos) = (brother, brother)
    # How is [Valerie] related to [Clarence]?
    return relation(Valerie, Clarence)




"""
[James] is happy that his daughter is doing so well. Her name is [Enedina]. [James] and his daughter [Teresa] spent Father's Day together. [Teresa] took her dad out to a sports bar, and they had a great time watching football and drinking beer there. [Enedina] went to the opera with her grandfather [Stanley].
Question: How is [Teresa] related to [Stanley]?
"""
# solution in Python:
def solution():
    # [James] is happy that his daughter is doing so well. Her name is [Enedina].
    relation(James, Enedina) = (father, daughter)
    # [James] and his daughter [Teresa] spent Father's Day together.
    relation(James, Teresa) = (father, daughter)
    # [Enedina] went to the opera with her grandfather [Stanley].
    relation(Enedina, Stanley) = (granddaughter, grandfather)
    # How is [Teresa] related to [Stanley]?
    return relation(Teresa, Stanley)




"""
[Carlos] and his wife [Venita] are going to be at the play. [Carlos] went to visit his sister [Elizabeth] to the hospital last week. [Elizabeth] 'father, [Alan], recently went back to school.
Question: How is [Alan] related to [Venita]?
"""
# solution in Python:
def solution():
    # [Carlos] and his wife [Venita] are going to be at the play.
    relation(Carlos, Venita) = (husband, wife)
    # [Carlos] went to visit his sister [Elizabeth] to the hospital last week.
    relation(Carlos, Elizabeth) = (brother, sister)
    # [Elizabeth] 'father, [Alan], recently went back to school.
    relation(Elizabeth, Alan) = (daughter, father)
    # How is [Alan] related to [Venita]?
    return relation(Alan, Venita)

    # [Elliott] is excited to cheer on his brother [James] in the homecoming game tonight.

    # [Alan] love his brother [Elliott]. They are always playing together.
    relation(Alan, Elliott) = (brother, brother)
    # [Alan] loves his daughter [Annie].
    relation(Alan, Annie) = (father, daughter)
    # How is [Annie] related to [James]?
    return relation(Annie, James)
